'''Bendu Fry''' was a portly [[Devaronian/Legends|Devaronian]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] criminal wanted dead or alive by the [[Black Sun/Legends|Black Sun]] criminal syndicate. [[Boba Fett/Legends|Boba Fett]], a [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]], tracked Fry down in a [[Cantina/Legends|cantina]] in the company of two [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Twi'lek/Legends|Twi'leks]] and told him to surrender. Fry ran away, but Fett was easily able to catch him with a rope shot out from his glove. However, the Devaronian told Fett that there was a [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] on the planet. Fett followed Fry's tip, allowing him to live, and tracked the "Jedi" down only to find out that he was actually the son of a [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] who had perished during the [[First Battle of Geonosis/Legends|First Battle of Geonosis]]. Fett then returned and killed Fry.
